name: Breeding Wars - Chapter 01 - Prisoners of Pillage
description:
- Rex Imperia -

- North Coast, Southwest Area -

The Rex Imperia Faction rules nearly half of the planet Domino. Like every major or even minor Factions, the primary method of recruitment is breeding. All nations, cities, and territories under their control are required to give an annual tithe, not just taxes and resources, but strong verile peoples. Once a year, the Imperia Militarum travels to each nation city and tribes in their territory round up new recruits who will either be soldiers or breeding stock, male or female.

The Granite City of Xebec is a City hidden in the Southwest forests, come to the cats. Your platoon is responsible for transportation for the cats who will be breeders. As per protocol, all breeders are to be bound tightly, blindfolded, and gagged before being put in individual cages aboard transport trucks. From there, you'll travel to one of the multiple Fortresses where they be put in the Stockades, the facility where they be placed in rows upon rows of brothel pods and milking machines.

You and your subordinates, Sergeant Cole a Wolf your second in command, Private Jola a Cat who was originally from this City, and Private Stracus a thuggish Lizard are sent with your platoon by the Iceberg Fortress to add them to the breeding facility.

Rex Imperia Militarum Ranking System:

Military Ranks

Rust/Foot soldier

Carbon/ Squad Leaders or sergeants

Bronze/Captains

Silver/Corporals

Gold/Lieutenants

Platinum/ Commanders

Caminus/Generals and Admirals

Rex Imperia Militarum Ranking System:

Military Ranks

Rust/ Foot soldier

Carbon/ Squad Leaders or sergeants

Bronze/ Captains

Silver/ Corporals

Gold/ Lieutenants

Platinum/ Commanders

Caminus/Generals and Admirals

Militarum Classes:

Warrior/Warriors are armored front line melee and short range fighters that rush into enemy defenses to open up the attack and protect other units.

Strike/ Strike units deal the highest damage at a short range and can perform powerful airstrikes on single targets from great distances, but are typically glass cannon fighters.

Gunner/Gunners shoot over walls and bombard large areas with their weapons from long range. Like the Strike units, they're deadly but vulnerable.

Medic/Medics heal and support other units in battle. They are only a few medics per platoon, and they aren't durable themselves, so are kept in the backline.

Specialist/Specialist units are highly individualized fighters with unique capabilities. This class incorporates leaders, scouts, and deployers.

Double/Doubles come with two specialties making them highly versatile in battle. Are often equipped with esoteric weapons and gear.
creator: Clay81901
